site.name: AVM Paul Masiyer Movement
site.tagline: Service. Sacrifice. Commitment. — A New Dawn for Mangu/Bokkos
site.candidate: Air Vice Marshal Paul D. Masiyer (Rtd.)
site.description: Join the PMM — AVM Paul Masiyer's movement to bring 35 years of military discipline, strategic leadership, and genuine commitment back home to serve Mangu/Bokkos Federal Constituency.

contact.whatsappMessage: I want to Join the AVM Paul Masiyer Movement.
